headline: Gifted Education Program Serves Only 2,800 of Estimated 50,000 Eligible
context: MOE's PERMATA Pintar and PERMATApintar programs identify and serve a tiny fraction of high-ability students.

cards.big: Only 2,800 gifted students served in 2025 while an estimated 50,000 qualify
cards.sub: 94% of high-ability students receive no differentiated instruction

cards.big: PERMATApintar National Gifted Centre at UKM has capacity for only 400 students
cards.sub: Single residential center model cannot scale to national demand

cards.big: Gifted students who do not receive enrichment show 35% higher dropout rates
cards.sub: Boredom and disengagement affect high-ability learners in standard classrooms

cards.big: Singapore identifies and supports gifted students in 9 schools across 4 zones since 1984
cards.sub: Distributed model reaches more students than centralized residential programs

cards.big: Neglecting gifted education squanders the very talent Malaysia claims to value most
Should every state have at least one gifted education center rather than one national program
